nasb.text: from Aroer, which is on the edge of the valley of the Arnon, with the city which is in the middle of the valley, and all the plain of Medeba, as far as Dibon;

esv.text: from Aroer, which is on the edge of the Valley of the Arnon, and the city that is in the middle of the valley, and all the tableland of Medeba as far as Dibon;

cnv.text: 就是從亞嫩谷邊的亞羅珥和谷中間的城，以及米底巴的整片平原，直到底本；

ccb.text: 从亚嫩谷旁的亚罗珥起，包括谷中的城，直到底本的整个米底巴平原，
